name: obsidian-github-copilot-agent
description: AI agent powered by GitHub Models or Copilot SDK, with MCP support and audit-logged default-deny security.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.type:check: tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --module ESNext --target ES2021 --moduleResolution node --baseUrl src --strict --noImplicitAny true --noUncheckedIndexedAccess true --strictNullChecks true --allowSyntheticDefaultImports true --esModuleInterop true --lib DOM,ES2021 src/main.ts src/settings/settings.ts src/chat/_pending-imports.d.ts src/chat/types.ts src/chat/nativeTools.ts src/chat/ToolMessage.ts src/chat/MessageList.ts src/chat/InputBar.ts src/chat/ChatViewModel.ts src/chat/ChatView.ts src/chat/index.ts

author: j-dahl
